description: Unit tests for the Manipulator module, testing data attribute setting, removal, and retrieval functions within a DOM manipulation context.

methods.name: setDataAttribute
methods.description: Sets a data attribute on a DOM element, prefixed with 'data-bs-' and in kebab case.

methods.name: removeDataAttribute
methods.description: Removes a specific data attribute with 'data-bs-' prefix from a DOM element.

methods.name: getDataAttributes
methods.description: Retrieves all 'data-bs-' prefixed data attributes from a DOM element, excluding certain attributes like 'bs-config'.

methods.name: getDataAttribute
methods.description: Retrieves a specific 'data-bs-' prefixed data attribute from a DOM element, with normalization and JSON parsing.
